message:
fix(gen_server): clean up task record on failed named spawn (bd-2wds9)

When spawn_named_gen_server fails at the name registration step, the
task record created by spawn_gen_server was leaked in the region's child
list. This orphaned task could never complete, preventing the owning
region from reaching quiescence.

Now the Err branch removes the task from both the region record and the
state before returning NameTaken. Regression assertion added to the
existing named_server_duplicate_name_rejected test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
